fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the record.

fields.name: Cash Flow Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the cash flow account that the entry on the manual revenue line is registered to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the cash flow forecast entry.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the cash flow entry.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date from which manual expenses should be registered for the cash flow forecast.

fields.name: Recurring Frequency
fields.tooltip: Specifies how often the entry on the manual expense line is registered, if the journal template used is set up to be recurring

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total amount in LCY that the manual expense consists of. The entered amount is the amount that is registered in the given time period per recurring frequency.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.
